text=open("/mnt/data/file-CQD6rmogKJked99ojaFnDH-text_to_analyse.txt","r",encoding="utf-8").read()
spans=[]
# define targets
targets=[("لا تلبسوا الحرير؛ فإنه من لبسه في الدنيا لم يلبسه في الآخرة","Hadith"),
         ("وَلَا تَبَرَّجْنَ تَبَرُّجَ الْجَاهِلِيَّةِ الْأُولَى","Ayah"),
         ("وَلِبَاسُهُمْ فِيهَا حَرِيرٌ","Ayah"),
]
# Note there are two occurrences of the Ayah in فاطر; we'll handle by finding all occurrences of that string.
for s,t in targets:
    if s in text:
        start=text.find(s)
        spans.append({"span_start":start,"span_end":start+len(s),"span_text":s,"citation_type":t})
# For multiple occurrences of same ayah string, add all by scanning
ay="وَلِبَاسُهُمْ فِيهَا حَرِيرٌ"
idx=0
while True:
    i=text.find(ay, idx)
    if i==-1: break
    # avoid duplicates from earlier single detection if exact same? We already added one for first occurrence. Add all distinct occurrences; check not already included
    if not any(sp["span_start"]==i for sp in spans):
        spans.append({"span_start":i,"span_end":i+len(ay),"span_text":ay,"citation_type":"Ayah"})
    idx=i+1
spans_sorted=sorted(spans,key=lambda x:x["span_start"])
spans_sorted, len(spans_sorted)
